title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — NAM — Q2 FY2026 (May – July 2026)
summary: International standard-setters FATF, FSB, and IOSCO are converging on Q3-Q4 2026 deliverables for DeFi AML, stablecoin oversight, and crypto market conduct—frameworks that will cascade into U.S. and Canadian rulemaking through 2027. NAM Account Executives should position now with FIs, exchanges, and regulators who need compliance infrastructure *before* domestic rules codify these global standards.
